content.boundary: Bounded to how identification is defined and adjudicated; does not address finance formulas, workforce capacity, or school-choice/sorting mechanisms directly
content.change_lever: Structural redesign of identification categories and/or the gatekeeping process, drawing on comparative tiered/non-categorical models as evidence subject to explicit Hungarian transferability testing
content.name: Transition toward a non-categorical, tiered support model with restructured gatekeeping
content.system_problem: The sole nationwide expert-committee gatekeeper faces rising caseloads and multi-month waiting lists without restructuring; the SNI/BTMN binary and its severity-based legal distinctions (e.g., unequal grading-exemption treatment) may themselves drive volatile reclassification incentives rather than reflecting genuine need
